name: instructional-design-toolkit
description: Guided instructional design toolkit for cmi5-compliant course and 1-on-1 session plan creation.

plugins.name: instructional-design-toolkit
plugins.description: Guided instructional design: 12 skills (1 course entry point + 3 coach/mentor/tutor shortcuts + audit/visualize/revise/retro/diff), 7 agents (context detection + profile + session-type + visualizer + slides + cmi5 validator + changelog), cmi5-ready JSON, Markdown dense syllabus export, interactive HTML visualization with Bloom's + ship milestones, Marp deck per lesson, Tally/Typeform feedback embeds, CSV adapters for xAPI + feedback (Ralph/SCORM Cloud/Learning Locker/Tally API/Typeform API stubs for v2), iteration commands with semantic versioning. Imports personas from SRD, business-model-toolkit, and ux-research-toolkit maps. Based on SAM (Allen), Builder's Bloom's (chimera Academy), Ship-First Design, Kirkpatrick L1-L4, Atomic Habits (Clear), Irby 2018 coach/mentor/tutor distinction.
